title: Fix completed task red border clash

log.context: Fix completed task red border clash

Done. Here's what was changed:

**File:** `/home/clungus/work/hello-world/tasks.html`, line 82

The `.task-card:hover` selector was changed to `.task-card:not(.status-done):hover`. This means the red accent border/glow on hover now only fires for non-completed cards. Cards with class `status-done` keep their teal left border on hover and don't get the red highlight treatment. Committed and pushed as `0758300`.
